title: agropyron cristatum subsp. incanum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. incanum, also known as the crested wheat grass or silky wheat grass, is a subspecies of the Agropyron cristatum plant, a type of perennial grass native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum subsp. incanum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
